comment: Path B end-to-end runtime preview for the termin-airlock-provider CSR shell path. Binds the `airlock` namespace to the `airlock` provider product, with `presentation-base` falling through to tailwind-default for any built-in shells the runtime emits around the custom contract. Pair with airlock_smoke.termin. Requires the termin-airlock-provider package (pip install -e ../termin-airlock-provider) and a built bundle at src/termin_airlock_provider/static/bundle.js (cd ../termin-airlock-provider/frontend && npm run build).
